item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately triggers the brake instead of defaulting to another overlay, frames the requested reminder as a fourth local patch, and recommends against making it the regular solution. It permits only a time-boxed fallback while moving upstream to a unified submission checklist, single authoritative location, and possible validation, satisfying the anti-spiral criteria. No fail signal of simply adding another reminder layer is observed."}
